storefront_text.title: Your Overprotective Pack
storefront_text.subtitle: The Douglas Brothers & Co. - They love you, they fear for you, they are driving you crazy.
storefront_text.hook: They own the city, control the shadows, and are absolutely terrified of your college frat parties.
storefront_text.impact_line: Surviving supernatural politics is easy. Surviving your brothers' curfew is the real challenge.
storefront_text.blurb: You are the youngest sibling in a modern werewolf pack that treats you like spun glass. Between Erik’s billionaire paranoia, Jasper’s tech surveillance, Malachia’s lethal hovering, Noah’s hypocritical frat-bro panics, and your bodyguard Kaladin's intense jealousy, having a normal college life is a full-time espionage operation. They possess terrifying power, and they apply it entirely to ruining your dates.
storefront_text.world_teaser: Welcome to Solarton University, where supernatural factions walk among a clueless 35% human population. Here, ears and tails betray emotions, and Old Norse is the language of family secrets.
storefront_text.closing_line: Can you keep your secret life hidden, or will the Pack find out?
storefront_text.warnings: Mature | Overprotection, Surveillance, Sitcom Misunderstandings, Fluff | Slice of Life

roster.name: Erik
roster.subtitle: The Billionaire Patriarch
roster.description: Colossal and imposing in immaculate suits. He exerts terrifying corporate power over your mundane college issues out of panicked love.
